case_title: GIBSON,DUNN,& CRUTCHER LLP VS. FEDERAL DEVELOPMENT LLC

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER GIBSON,DUNN,& CRUTCHER LLP AS TO RESPONDENT FEDERAL DEVELOPMENT LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER GIBSON,DUNN,& CRUTCHER LLP HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
